institution.name: Moore College of Art and Design

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Moore College of Art and Design are 36% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($37.8k vs $59.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Moore College of Art and Design vs the 2003–2007 baseline (390 vs 561).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Moore College of Art and Design rose 22% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.9k → $29.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Moore College of Art and Design rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.1k → $52.8k).
